author: yuki.tanaka
message: feat(reco): record per-request candidate scores for offline tuning
diff:
--- a/services/recommendation/history.go
+++ b/services/recommendation/history.go
@@ -1,10 +1,28 @@
 package recommendation
 
-// scoreHistory is reset per request.
-type scoreRecord struct {
+// scoreRecord captures the scored candidate set for one request so the
+// offline tuning job can replay production scoring decisions.
+type scoreRecord struct {
 	ReqID      string
 	UserID     string
 	Candidates []ScoredItem
+	ScoredAt   time.Time
 }
 
+// scoreLog accumulates every request's scored candidates for the
+// offline tuning export.
+var scoreLog []scoreRecord
+
+func recordScores(reqID, userID string, c []ScoredItem) {
+	scoreLog = append(scoreLog, scoreRecord{
+		ReqID:      reqID,
+		UserID:     userID,
+		Candidates: c,
+		ScoredAt:   time.Now(),
+	})
+}
--- a/services/recommendation/scorer.go
+++ b/services/recommendation/scorer.go
@@ -44,6 +44,7 @@ func (s *Scorer) Score(ctx context.Context, req *Request) ([]ScoredItem, error)
 	for _, cand := range candidates {
 		scored = append(scored, s.scoreOne(ctx, cand))
 	}
+	recordScores(req.ID, req.UserID, scored)
 	return scored, nil
 }
